testcase.name: single user message returns assistant response
multi-turn conversation with system + user + assistant history
missing messages still reaches SDK (plugin does not validate)
empty messages array still reaches SDK (plugin does not validate)

testcase.name: GET /api/health returns OK with endpoint list

testcase.name: GET / serves UI5 index.html

testcase.name: POST /api/embedding returns 1536-dim vector

completion contains the mock AI response
